title: The Hitch Hiker's Guide to the Galaxy
author: Douglas Adams
description: A hapless Earthman hitchhikes through the galaxy after Earth is demolished to make way for a hyperspace bypass.

title: Watchmen
author: Alan Moore
description: A group of retired superheroes investigates a conspiracy that threatens to reshape the balance of global power.

title: The Martian
author: Andy Weir
description: A stranded astronaut must use his ingenuity to survive alone on Mars and find a way to signal Earth for rescue.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
description: A lone astronaut must save Earth from extinction by solving an impossible scientific mystery in deep space.

title: Six of Crows
author: Leigh Bardugo
description: Six dangerous outcasts attempt an impossible heist that could make them rich beyond their wildest dreams.

title: Ender's Game
author: Orson Scott Card
description: A brilliant child is recruited to a military academy in space to train for an alien war that will determine humanity's survival.

title: The Throne of Fire
author: Rick Riordan
description: Two young magicians must awaken the sun god Ra before a chaos serpent destroys the world.

title: The Two Towers
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: The fellowship is broken as war spreads across Middle-earth and the ring bearer continues his perilous journey to Mordor.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: A young nobleman must navigate deadly politics and harsh desert survival on a planet that controls the universe's most valuable resource.

title: Second Foundation
author: Isaac Asimov
description: The remnants of a galactic empire search for a secret organization of psychic scholars who hold the key to humanity's future.

title: Stories of Your Life and Others
author: Ted Chiang
description: A collection of brilliant short stories exploring language, mathematics, free will, and what it means to be human.

title: Nineteen Eighty-Four
author: George Orwell
description: In a totalitarian society where Big Brother watches everything, one man dares to think forbidden thoughts of rebellion.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A reluctant hobbit joins a company of dwarves on a quest to reclaim their mountain homeland from a fearsome dragon.

title: The Lightning Thief
author: Rick Riordan
description: A twelve-year-old discovers he's the son of Poseidon and must prevent a war among the Greek gods.

title: A Clash of Kings
author: George R. R. Martin
description: Five kings vie for control of the Seven Kingdoms as ancient dark forces stir beyond the Wall.

title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
author: J. K. Rowling
description: A dangerous prisoner escapes the wizarding world's most feared prison, and Harry discovers surprising truths about his past.

title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
author: J. K. Rowling
description: An orphaned boy discovers he is a wizard and enters a magical school where he uncovers his extraordinary destiny.

title: A Game of Thrones
author: George R. R. Martin
description: Noble families wage a bloody war for control of the Iron Throne while an ancient enemy awakens in the frozen north.

title: Tiamat's Wrath
author: James S. A. Corey
description: Humanity faces its greatest threat as an authoritarian empire clashes with incomprehensible alien forces beyond the gates.

title: Death's End (The Three-Body Problem Series Book 3)
author: 刘慈欣
description: The final chapter of the Three-Body trilogy spans millions of years as humanity confronts the ultimate fate of the universe.

title: The One (The Selection #3)
author: Kiera Cass
description: In the final round of a royal competition, a young woman must choose between love and duty as the kingdom faces rebellion.

title: Les Robots
author: Isaac Asimov
description: Asimov's foundational collection introduces the Three Laws of Robotics through stories of machines that are more human than they seem.

title: Making Money
author: Terry Pratchett
description: A reformed con artist takes charge of the Royal Mint and discovers that the world of banking is even more crooked than he is.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: A groundbreaking exploration of evolution from the gene's perspective that forever changed how we understand life and behavior.

title: Leviathan Wakes
author: James S. A. Corey
description: A detective and a ship captain uncover a terrifying alien weapon that threatens to reshape human civilization across the solar system.

title: Flowers for Algernon
author: Daniel Keyes
description: A mentally disabled man undergoes an experimental procedure that dramatically increases his intelligence, with bittersweet consequences.

title: Kindred
author: Octavia E. Butler
description: A modern Black woman is repeatedly pulled back in time to the antebellum South where she must ensure her own ancestor's survival.

title: Caliban's war
author: James S. A. Corey
description: A monster is unleashed on Ganymede as the solar system's fragile peace shatters and a father desperately searches for his missing daughter.

title: Bumi Manusia
author: Pramoedya Ananta Toer
description: A young Javanese man in colonial Indonesia struggles against the injustices of colonialism while pursuing forbidden love.

title: Saga
author: Brian K. Vaughan
description: Star-crossed lovers from warring alien species flee across the galaxy with their newborn, hunted by both sides of an endless war.

title: Animal Farm
author: George Orwell
description: A group of farm animals overthrow their human owner only to find their new leaders are just as oppressive.

title: The Stand
author: Stephen King
description: After a plague wipes out most of humanity, the survivors are drawn into a final battle between good and evil.

title: Cryptonomicon
author: Neal Stephenson
description: Two timelines interweave as WWII codebreakers and their modern descendants chase gold, secrets, and the birth of data privacy.

title: Mort
author: Terry Pratchett
description: Death takes on an apprentice, a clumsy young man who accidentally disrupts the natural order by saving a princess who should have died.

title: Saga, Volume Five
author: Brian K. Vaughan
description: The star-crossed family faces new threats and devastating losses as the galaxy's war catches up with them once more.

title: Network Effect
author: Martha Wells
description: Murderbot is dragged into a rescue mission on a hostile alien world and must confront a threat connected to its past.

title: Parable of the Sower
author: Octavia E. Butler
description: In a near-future America ravaged by climate change and inequality, a young woman with a gift for empathy founds a new faith.

title: Slaughterhouse-Five
author: Kurt Vonnegut
description: A soldier becomes unstuck in time, reliving moments from his life including the firebombing of Dresden and an alien abduction.

title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
author: Ransom Riggs
description: A teenager discovers a hidden refuge for children with supernatural abilities, hunted by terrifying creatures that feed on their powers.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A sweeping history of humankind from Stone Age foragers to Silicon Valley rulers, questioning every assumption about human progress.

title: Roadside Picnic
author: Аркадий Натанович Стругацкий
description: Scavengers risk their lives exploring zones of alien debris left behind after a brief extraterrestrial visitation to Earth.

title: Feet of Clay
author: Terry Pratchett
description: Commander Vimes investigates a series of poisonings in Ankh-Morpork while golems begin showing signs of disturbing independence.

title: The Last Question
author: Isaac Asimov
description: Across trillions of years, humanity repeatedly asks a supercomputer whether entropy can be reversed, leading to a stunning cosmic conclusion.

title: Sabriel
author: Garth Nix
description: A young woman crosses into a realm of the dead to rescue her father using ancient magic and a set of necromantic bells.

title: A Deepness in the Sky (Zones of Thought)
author: Vernor Vinge
description: Two human civilizations race to make first contact with an alien species that hibernates for centuries between brief periods of wakefulness.

title: Old Man’s War
author: John Scalzi
description: On his 75th birthday, a man enlists in an interstellar military that will give him a young body in exchange for fighting alien wars.

title: Hyperion
author: Dan Simmons
description: Seven pilgrims share their stories as they journey to confront the terrifying Shrike on the world of Hyperion.

title: The Hunger Games
author: Suzanne Collins
description: A teenage girl volunteers to fight to the death in a televised arena to save her younger sister.

title: Memories of ice
author: Steven Erikson
description: Ancient forces of chaos threaten to consume the world as unlikely allies forge a desperate military campaign against overwhelming evil.

title: Artificial Condition
author: Martha Wells
description: Murderbot teams up with a sarcastic transport ship AI to investigate a past massacre it may have been responsible for.

title: Anathem
author: Neal Stephenson
description: Cloistered monk-scientists on an alien world are drawn out of seclusion when a mysterious spacecraft appears in orbit.

title: V for Vendetta
author: Alan Moore
description: A masked anarchist wages a one-man war against a fascist British government in a haunting tale of freedom and vengeance.

author: Arthur C. Clarke
description: A mysterious alien monolith propels humanity on a journey from prehistoric Earth to the outer reaches of the solar system.

title: The Price of Salt
author: Patricia Highsmith
description: Two women in 1950s New York risk everything for a forbidden love that defies the conventions of their era.

title: The Glass Castle
author: Jeannette Walls
description: A memoir of a nomadic, deeply dysfunctional family where the children learn to fend for themselves amid poverty and parental chaos.

title: Jurassic Park
author: Michael Crichton
description: A billionaire's theme park of genetically resurrected dinosaurs goes catastrophically wrong when the animals break free.

title: La Nuit
author: Elie Wiesel
description: A harrowing memoir of survival in Nazi concentration camps that bears witness to humanity's capacity for cruelty and resilience.

title: Catching Fire
author: Suzanne Collins
description: The girl who defied the Capitol becomes a symbol of rebellion as the games take on deadly new dimensions.

title: A Fire upon the Deep
author: Vernor Vinge
description: A rescue mission across the galaxy races against a malevolent superintelligence accidentally unleashed from an ancient digital archive.

title: The fire next time
author: James Baldwin
description: A powerful examination of race in America through two deeply personal essays that remain devastatingly relevant decades later.

title: Children of Time
author: Adrian Tchaikovsky
description: The last humans search for a new home and discover a planet where spiders have evolved into a spacefaring civilization.

title: Small Gods
author: Terry Pratchett
description: A god reduced to a tortoise teams up with a simple novice to challenge the corrupt church built in his name.

title: Morning Star
author: Pierce Brown
description: A revolutionary from the lowest caste leads a final desperate uprising against the ruling elite of a color-coded solar system.

title: Metamorphosis
author: Franz Kafka
description: A man wakes up one morning transformed into a giant insect, and his family must cope with the grotesque change.

title: The player of games
author: Iain Banks
description: The galaxy's greatest game player is recruited by a utopian civilization's secret service to compete in an empire-defining alien tournament.

title: Foundation
author: Isaac Asimov
description: A mathematician devises a plan to preserve knowledge as a vast galactic empire crumbles into barbarism.

title: Gideon the Ninth
author: Tamsyn Muir
description: A swordswoman and her necromancer navigate a haunted palace full of rival magic users in a universe of bone and death.

title: Animal Farm / Nineteen Eighty-Four
author: George Orwell
description: Two of Orwell's masterpieces—a barnyard fable of revolution betrayed and a chilling vision of totalitarian surveillance—collected together.

title: The Complete Robot
author: Isaac Asimov
description: A comprehensive collection of Asimov's robot stories tracing the evolution of artificial beings from simple machines to complex minds.

title: Das Glasperlenspiel
author: Hermann Hesse
description: In a futuristic intellectual utopia, a master of an elaborate philosophical game questions the meaning of his sheltered existence.

title: Foundation and Empire
author: Isaac Asimov
description: The Foundation faces its greatest threat when a mutant conqueror with mind-control powers derails the grand plan to save civilization.

title: Rendezvous with Rama
author: Arthur C. Clarke
description: A massive alien spacecraft enters the solar system, and a crew races to explore its mysteries before it swings past the sun.

title: The Dark Forest (The Three-Body Problem Series Book 2)
author: 刘慈欣
description: Humanity prepares for an alien invasion four centuries away while grappling with the terrifying implications of the dark forest theory of the cosmos.

title: Dream Country
author: Neil Gaiman
description: Four standalone tales from the Sandman universe explore myth, Shakespeare, and the boundaries between dreams and reality.

title: Life, the Universe and Everything
author: Douglas Adams
description: Arthur Dent discovers that the people of Krikkit want to destroy the universe and only he can stop them.

title: Contact
author: Carl Sagan
description: A scientist receives a message from an alien civilization and embarks on a journey that challenges everything humanity believes.

title: Persepolis Rising (The Expanse Book 7)
author: James S. A. Corey
description: A time jump reveals a changed solar system under authoritarian rule as the aging crew of the Rocinante faces a new empire.

title: The Dispossessed
author: Ursula K. Le Guin
description: A brilliant physicist from an anarchist moon colony visits the wealthy planet it orbits, confronting two radically different societies.

title: The Drawing of the Three
author: Stephen King
description: The last gunslinger draws three people from different eras of New York into his quest for the Dark Tower.

title: Deadhouse Gates (The Malazan Book of the Fallen, Book 2)
author: Steven Erikson
description: An epic chain of events unfolds across a continent as a massive rebellion threatens to consume an entire civilization.

title: Rogue Protocol
author: Martha Wells
description: Murderbot investigates a decommissioned terraforming facility to find evidence of corporate wrongdoing while pretending not to care about anything.

title: Misery
author: Stephen King
description: A famous author is rescued from a car crash by his self-proclaimed number one fan, who holds him captive to rewrite his latest novel.

title: Братья Карамазовы
author: Фёдор Михайлович Достоевский
description: Three brothers grapple with faith, doubt, and patricide in this sweeping philosophical novel about the nature of morality and existence.

title: Golden Son
author: Pierce Brown
description: A revolutionary infiltrator rises through the elite ranks of a color-coded society while plotting to tear it down from within.

title: A Dance With Dragons
author: George R. R. Martin
description: Across two continents, alliances shift and power struggles intensify as dragons return and winter finally arrives.

title: Tao te Ching
author: 老子
description: The foundational text of Taoism offers timeless wisdom on living in harmony with the natural way of the universe.

title: The Picture of Dorian Gray
author: Oscar Wilde
description: A beautiful young man's portrait ages while he remains youthful, but his soul darkens with each act of cruelty and excess.

title: Alanna
author: Tamora Pierce
description: A girl disguises herself as a boy to train as a knight, defying tradition and discovering her own magical abilities.

title: Starsight
author: Brandon Sanderson
description: A young pilot infiltrates an alien space station to uncover the truth about a mysterious force that threatens all of civilization.

title: Defy Me (Shatter Me)
author: Tahereh Mafi
description: A young woman with lethal powers confronts shocking truths about her past as the war for the future of society intensifies.

title: The Struggle
author: Lisa Jane Smith
description: Ancient vampire forces converge as Elena faces her darkest challenge yet in the world of the supernatural.

title: Pimp
author: Iceberg Slim
description: A raw autobiographical account of street life in mid-twentieth century America, told with unflinching honesty.

title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland
author: Lewis Carroll
description: A young girl falls down a rabbit hole into a fantastical world of absurd creatures and impossible logic.

title: Wolves of the Calla
author: Stephen King
description: Roland and his ka-tet must defend a peaceful farming community from raiders who steal children in this dark fantasy epic.

title: American Gods
author: Neil Gaiman
description: A recently released convict discovers that old gods brought to America by immigrants are at war with new gods of technology.
